list.name: Changes
list.comment:
EA: validation-aware fitness + triage logging
- Fitness is now Train/Validation split (70/30) and ranks by Validation: score = 0.55*Sharpe_valid + 0.25*CAGR_valid + 0.10*TotalReturn_valid - 0.10*MaxDD_valid + 0.05*clip(Sharpe_train, 0..2)
- Light regularizers (tie-breakers): • Penalty if tp_multiple < ~1.3 (discourage micro take-profits) • Penalty if exit_n / breakout_n > 0.80 (avoid exit nearly as slow as entry) • Penalty if trades_valid < 8 (filter tiny-sample flukes)
- Triage / diagnostics: • Added console prints showing TRAIN and VALID metrics when best improves • Continues to print core metrics and params each improvement
- Implementation: • src/tuning/evolve.py: - new _split_dates() helper - _fitness(): Train/Valid evaluation + regularizers + optional debug payload - _print_debug(): now shows -- TRAIN -- and -- VALID -- rows if available - evolve_params(): calls _fitness(..., use_validation=True), retains elitism/crossover/mutation
- Usage: • Ensure tuner calls evolve_params(..., debug_mode=True) to see console triage • Run via: `streamlit run Home.py` and watch terminal logs
- Notes: • No changes to strategy API or UI controls • Expected effect: fewer “high win rate / low CAGR” solutions; more robust out-of-sample picks

task.summary: Working V1 framework. No evolution algo
Working V1 framework. No evolution algo
Working V1 framework. No evolution algo
Working V1 framework. No evolution algo
engine updates. pre tker page update
updated with addtional model params and working profile selectors
added universe and ticker dropdowns from json - still not performing well enough, need more aggressive strategy
- Checkbox to toggle risk-parity vs equal weights. - Compute weights from daily stddev of returns over sim range. - Keep per-ticker strategy selection + portfolio params fallback.
individual ticker graphs in simulation results with buy and sell markers
Auto bounds for initial model params BETA
random improvements to evolve not realy giving good results

EA: validation-aware fitness + triage logging
- Fitness is now Train/Validation split (70/30) and ranks by Validation: score = 0.55*Sharpe_valid + 0.25*CAGR_valid + 0.10*TotalReturn_valid - 0.10*MaxDD_valid + 0.05*clip(Sharpe_train, 0..2)
- Light regularizers (tie-breakers): • Penalty if tp_multiple < ~1.3 (discourage micro take-profits) • Penalty if exit_n / breakout_n > 0.80 (avoid exit nearly as slow as entry) • Penalty if trades_valid < 8 (filter tiny-sample flukes)
- Triage / diagnostics: • Added console prints showing TRAIN and VALID metrics when best improves • Continues to print core metrics and params each improvement
- Implementation: • src/tuning/evolve.py: - new _split_dates() helper - _fitness(): Train/Valid evaluation + regularizers + optional debug payload - _print_debug(): now shows -- TRAIN -- and -- VALID -- rows if available - evolve_params(): calls _fitness(..., use_validation=True), retains elitism/crossover/mutation
- Usage: • Ensure tuner calls evolve_params(..., debug_mode=True) to see console triage • Run via: `streamlit run Home.py` and watch terminal logs
- Notes: • No changes to strategy API or UI controls • Expected effect: fewer “high win rate / low CAGR” solutions; more robust out-of-sample picks

MESSAGE.value: Working V1 framework. No evolution algo
engine updates. pre tker page update
updated with addtional model params and working profile selectors
added universe and ticker dropdowns from json - still not performing well enough, need more aggressive strategy
- Checkbox to toggle risk-parity vs equal weights. - Compute weights from daily stddev of returns over sim range. - Keep per-ticker strategy selection + portfolio params fallback.
individual ticker graphs in simulation results with buy and sell markers
Auto bounds for initial model params BETA
random improvements to evolve not realy giving good results

EA: validation-aware fitness + triage logging
- Fitness is now Train/Validation split (70/30) and ranks by Validation: score = 0.55*Sharpe_valid + 0.25*CAGR_valid + 0.10*TotalReturn_valid - 0.10*MaxDD_valid + 0.05*clip(Sharpe_train, 0..2)
- Light regularizers (tie-breakers): • Penalty if tp_multiple < ~1.3 (discourage micro take-profits) • Penalty if exit_n / breakout_n > 0.80 (avoid exit nearly as slow as entry) • Penalty if trades_valid < 8 (filter tiny-sample flukes)
- Triage / diagnostics: • Added console prints showing TRAIN and VALID metrics when best improves • Continues to print core metrics and params each improvement
- Implementation: • src/tuning/evolve.py: - new _split_dates() helper - _fitness(): Train/Valid evaluation + regularizers + optional debug payload - _print_debug(): now shows -- TRAIN -- and -- VALID -- rows if available - evolve_params(): calls _fitness(..., use_validation=True), retains elitism/crossover/mutation
- Usage: • Ensure tuner calls evolve_params(..., debug_mode=True) to see console triage • Run via: `streamlit run Home.py` and watch terminal logs
- Notes: • No changes to strategy API or UI controls • Expected effect: fewer “high win rate / low CAGR” solutions; more robust out-of-sample picks

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
EA: validation-aware fitness + triage logging
- Fitness is now Train/Validation split (70/30) and ranks by Validation: score = 0.55*Sharpe_valid + 0.25*CAGR_valid + 0.10*TotalReturn_valid - 0.10*MaxDD_valid + 0.05*clip(Sharpe_train, 0..2)
- Light regularizers (tie-breakers): • Penalty if tp_multiple < ~1.3 (discourage micro take-profits) • Penalty if exit_n / breakout_n > 0.80 (avoid exit nearly as slow as entry) • Penalty if trades_valid < 8 (filter tiny-sample flukes)
- Triage / diagnostics: • Added console prints showing TRAIN and VALID metrics when best improves • Continues to print core metrics and params each improvement
- Implementation: • src/tuning/evolve.py: - new _split_dates() helper - _fitness(): Train/Valid evaluation + regularizers + optional debug payload - _print_debug(): now shows -- TRAIN -- and -- VALID -- rows if available - evolve_params(): calls _fitness(..., use_validation=True), retains elitism/crossover/mutation
- Usage: • Ensure tuner calls evolve_params(..., debug_mode=True) to see console triage • Run via: `streamlit run Home.py` and watch terminal logs
- Notes: • No changes to strategy API or UI controls • Expected effect: fewer “high win rate / low CAGR” solutions; more robust out-of-sample picks
